title: Create Extra
description: Mainly just some small client mods for the amazing create mod
body: # Create Extra Create Extra is a small collection of mostly client-side mods designed to enhance your experience with the [Create Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) on **NeoForge**. This modpack adds select mods with the objective of providing a better Minecraft world or server experience, without overwhelming you with unnecessary additions. ### 📥 Installation - **Modrinth App:** You can download and play the modpack directly in the official [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app) - **Third party Launcher:** To install and play the modpack with the **.mrpack** file, follow the instructions [here](https://docs.modrinth.com/docs/modpacks/playing_modpacks/). - **Server Side:** To install the server-side mods, you can use [mrpack-install](https://github.com/nothub/mrpack-install). ### 🔄 Modpack Resources - **Resourcepack:** If you want to play with a nice vanilla-themed resource pack, we recommend [VanillaTweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/). # ### 🛠️ How do I set up the modpack? Starting from version **1.0.0**, it is now possible to configure the modpack using the [**Mod Sets**](https://modrinth.com/mod/mod-sets) mod. In order to configure the build as you want, you need to follow this path as soon as you enter the main menu: **(Mods -> Mod Sets -> Config)** # ### 📞 Contact If there are any problems with this project, please let me know on Discord. (gideonwhite1029) # ### 🛠️ Other projects
